references.title: Formation of highly oxygenated organic molecules from α-pinene photochemistry
references.publisher: Forschungszentrum Jülich, Energie & Umwelt / Energy & Environment, Band/Volume 557
references.note: α-pinene OH oxidation under pure / +CO / +isoprene / +NOx conditions

provenance.verification: 724 even-H CHO neutrals reproduce Kang's detected [M+NO3]- mass to <0.005 ppm
provenance.caveat: α-pinene & limonene are isomeric C10H16 with strongly overlapping OH-oxidation HOM; use as a monoterpene-HOM PROXY, not a limonene-specific list. Odd-H entries are radical HOM (RO/RO2), excluded from closed-shell matching by default.
